applicationForm.title: Application for Extension of Period of Stay
applicationForm.description: Available for download from the Immigration Bureau website

photo.title: Photo (4cm × 3cm)
photo.description: Taken within 3 months before application, no hat, plain background

employmentCertificate.title: Certificate of Employment or Employment Contract

companyRegistration.title: Company Registration Certificate
companyRegistration.description: Obtain from the Legal Affairs Bureau (issued within 3 months)

taxWithholding.title: Withholding Tax Certificate
taxWithholding.description: Previous year's withholding slip (obtain from employer)

reasonLetter.title: Reason Letter (Statement of Purpose)
reasonLetter.description: Optional but recommended. Explain the reason for continued stay (1-2 pages, A4)

workHistory.title: Work History / Resume
workHistory.description: Details of your work experience and skills (effective as supplementary explanation)

companyBrochure.title: Company Business Description
companyBrochure.description: Company brochure or business summary (especially important for Category 3 & 4 companies)

taxCertificate.title: Resident Tax Taxation Certificate
taxCertificate.description: Obtain from municipal office (for the most recent year)

taxPayment.title: Resident Tax Payment Certificate
taxPayment.description: Obtain from municipal office (for the most recent year)

financialStatement.title: Financial Statements (last 3 fiscal years)
financialStatement.description: Required for non-listed companies (Category 4): income statement and balance sheet

corporateTaxPayment.title: Corporate Tax Payment Certificate
corporateTaxPayment.description: Certificate of corporate tax payment (obtain from tax office)

applicationForm.title: Application for Extension of Period of Stay
applicationForm.description: Available for download from the Immigration Bureau website

photo.title: Photo (4cm × 3cm)
photo.description: Taken within 3 months before application, no hat, plain background

transcript.title: Academic Transcript
transcript.description: Transcript up to the previous semester

financialSupport.title: Proof of Financial Support
financialSupport.description: Bank balance certificate, scholarship certificate, etc.

scholarshipCertificate.title: Scholarship Certificate
scholarshipCertificate.description: Submit if you receive a scholarship (obtain from scholarship organization)

financialSponsorIncome.title: Financial Sponsor's Income Proof
financialSponsorIncome.description: If a parent or guardian covers expenses (tax certificate, bank statement, etc.)

attendanceExplanation.title: Explanation Letter for Low Attendance
attendanceExplanation.description: If attendance rate is below 80%, a written explanation may be required

applicationForm.title: Application for Extension of Period of Stay
applicationForm.description: Available for download from the Immigration Bureau website

photo.title: Photo (4cm × 3cm)
photo.description: Taken within 3 months before application, no hat, plain background

spouseEmployment.title: Spouse's Certificate of Employment
spouseEmployment.description: Obtain from your Japanese spouse's employer

identityGuarantee.title: Letter of Guarantee
identityGuarantee.description: Japanese spouse serves as the guarantor

familyRegister.title: Family Register (Koseki Tohon)
familyRegister.description: Family register proving the marriage (issued within 3 months)

relationshipEvidence.title: Evidence of Spousal Relationship
relationshipEvidence.description: Wedding photos, proof of cohabitation, communication records (helpful during strict screening)

spousePassportCopy.title: Japanese Spouse's Passport Copy
spousePassportCopy.description: Copy of the photo page of the Japanese spouse's passport

guarantorIncome.title: Guarantor's Income Proof
guarantorIncome.description: Spouse's tax certificate or withholding slip (proof of ability to support financially)

applicationForm.title: Application for Extension of Period of Stay
applicationForm.description: Available for download from the Immigration Bureau website

photo.title: Photo (4cm × 3cm)
photo.description: Taken within 3 months before application, no hat, plain background

spousePermanentCard.title: Spouse's Residence Card (Permanent Resident)
spousePermanentCard.description: Residence card of the permanent resident spouse (present original)

familyRegister.title: Family Register or Marriage Certificate
familyRegister.description: Document proving the marital relationship (translation may be required)

residenceCertificate.title: Residence Certificate (All Household Members)
residenceCertificate.description: Residence certificate proving cohabitation with your spouse

identityGuarantee.title: Letter of Guarantee
identityGuarantee.description: Permanent resident spouse serves as the guarantor

relationshipEvidence.title: Evidence of Genuine Cohabitation
relationshipEvidence.description: Documents proving shared life (lease agreement, utility bills, etc.)

marriagePhotos.title: Couple's Photos (Optional)
marriagePhotos.description: Wedding or everyday photos (recommended to verify genuine marriage)

taxCertificate.title: Resident Tax Taxation Certificate
taxCertificate.description: Tax certificate for the permanent resident spouse or applicant (obtain from municipal office)

taxPayment.title: Resident Tax Payment Certificate
taxPayment.description: Certificate proving no tax delinquency (obtain from municipal office)
